steps.title: Target why musicians prize them
steps.content: The question asks for a sentence emphasizing why Stradivarius violins are prized by musicians. The relevant note says musicians value them for their famed sound quality.

steps.title: Avoid naming and biography
steps.content: Choice A explains how some violins get names. Choice C gives Stradivari's dates. Choice D identifies Clara Bennett as a former owner. None explains why musicians prize the instruments. The sentence about renowned sound quality does. The answer is B.
